```python
import pytest
import time
import threading
from unittest.mock import MagicMock

def debounce(fn, wait_ms: int):
    import threading
    timer = [None]
    def debounced(*args, **kwargs):
        if timer[0]:
            timer[0].cancel()
        timer[0] = threading.Timer(wait_ms/1000, fn, args, kwargs)
        timer[0].start()
    return debounced


def test_debounce_happy_path():
    mock_fn = MagicMock()
    debounced_fn = debounce(mock_fn, 100)  # 100ms debounce

    debounced_fn()
    debounced_fn()
    debounced_fn()  # Call it multiple times quickly

    time.sleep(0.2)  # Wait for the debounce period to pass

    mock_fn.assert_called_once()


def test_debounce_with_arguments():
    mock_fn = MagicMock()
    debounced_fn = debounce(mock_fn, 100)

    debounced_fn(1, "hello", key="value")

    time.sleep(0.2)

    mock_fn.assert_called_once_with(1, "hello", key="value")


def test_debounce_zero_wait():
    mock_fn = MagicMock()
    debounced_fn = debounce(mock_fn, 0)

    debounced_fn()
    time.sleep(0.01) # Give it a tiny bit of time

    mock_fn.assert_called_once()


def test_debounce_long_wait():
    mock_fn = MagicMock()
    debounced_fn = debounce(mock_fn, 500)  # 500ms debounce

    debounced_fn()
    time.sleep(0.2)  # Wait less than the debounce period
    mock_fn.assert_not_called()

    time.sleep(0.4)  # Wait the rest of the debounce period
    mock_fn.assert_called_once()


def test_debounce_multiple_calls_with_different_args():
    mock_fn = MagicMock()
    debounced_fn = debounce(mock_fn, 100)

    debounced_fn(1)
    time.sleep(0.05)
    debounced_fn(2)
    time.sleep(0.05)
    debounced_fn(3)

    time.sleep(0.2)

    mock_fn.assert_called_once_with(3)


def test_debounce_multiple_debounced_functions():
    mock_fn1 = MagicMock()
    mock_fn2 = MagicMock()

    debounced_fn1 = debounce(mock_fn1, 100)
    debounced_fn2 = debounce(mock_fn2, 100)

    debounced_fn1()
    debounced_fn2()

    time.sleep(0.2)

    mock_fn1.assert_called_once()
    mock_fn2.assert_called_once()


def test_debounce_exception_in_debounced_function():
    def raising_fn():
        raise ValueError("Intentional error")

    debounced_fn = debounce(raising_fn, 100)

    with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="Intentional error"):
        debounced_fn()
        time.sleep(0.2)  # Wait for the debounced function to execute


def test_debounce_cancel_before_execution():
    mock_fn = MagicMock()
    timer = [None]

    def debounced(*args, **kwargs):
        if timer[0]:
            timer[0].cancel()
        timer[0] = threading.Timer(0.1, mock_fn, args, kwargs)
        timer[0].start()

    debounced()
    time.sleep(0.05)
    timer[0].cancel()
    time.sleep(0.1)
    mock_fn.assert_not_called()
```
